case_title: U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. PAUL RYAN ASSOCIATES

docket_entries.description: ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100091601) FILED BY PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION SERVED NOV-07-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PAUL RYAN ASSOCIATES PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON DEC-09-2019 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT PAUL RYAN ASSOCIATES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF IRWIN M. WITTLIN RE: ACCRUED INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAUL RYAN ASSOCIATES $81,678.56 PRINCIPAL, $1,342.66 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $83,471.22, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
